app.title: Hello everyone 😊
staleBanner.message: A new version of Claude Web is available.
plan.noneHint: When work on a feature starts, the plan appears here (plan.md at the project root) and updates live.
terminal.title: PowerShell terminal
terminal.exited: The shell has exited. Restart to open a new one.
terminal.streamError: Lost the terminal stream. Return to this tab to reattach.
terminal.shellExited: This shell has exited. Pick another or open a new one.
terminal.addShell: New shell or resume a conversation
terminal.capError: This project is at its live-terminal limit. Kill one first.
settings.tabOrderHint: Drag a card or use the arrows — the navigation bar below follows live. Synced across your devices.
settings.paneWidthHint: Pane width on desktop multi-pane: 1-4 slot units
settings.tabHiddenHint: Show or hide this tab in the navigation (advanced mode only)
guests.loadError: We couldn't load the guest list. Please try again.
guests.confirmRemove:
Remove "{name}" ({ip}) from the guest list?

Takes effect immediately: their live connections are terminated and every further request is rejected.
guests.confirmRemoveSelf:
"{name}" ({ip}) is YOUR OWN IP.

Removing it terminates this connection immediately and locks you out until the administrator re-approves you at the host PC. Remove anyway?
guests.removeError: We couldn't remove that guest. Please try again.
guests.approveHint: New IPs can only be approved in the desktop app on the host PC — never from here.
git.loadError: We couldn't read the git status. Please try again.
git.fetchError: Couldn't reach origin — showing the last known state.
git.driftAhead: local {base} is {n} ahead of origin (not pushed)
git.actBusy: Claude is working in this project — git actions are disabled until the run finishes.
git.actDirty: Uncommitted changes in the working tree — merge is disabled.
git.graphHint: Newest at the top, oldest at the bottom. HEAD = where you are.
git.reviewHint: What a pull request would show: this branch's commits and changes since it left {base}.
git.reviewNoCommits: No commits yet on this branch.
git.reviewNoFiles: No file changes vs the base.
git.reviewTruncated: Showing the first results — the full list is larger.
git.reviewPatchTruncated: Diff truncated — too large to show in full.
git.cleanHint: Everything is committed. Nothing has changed since the last save.
screen.captureError: We couldn't capture the screen. Please try again.
agents.title: Agents
agents.empty: No agents yet. Start one to run Claude on another project in parallel.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.empty: No agents yet. Start one in the Agents tab to see it here.
dashboard.maximize: Open this agent in full view
agents.color.label: Mark with a colour
repo.label: Project
projects.title: Projects
projects.addError: Couldn't add the project. Please check the path.
projects.loadError: We couldn't load your projects. Please try again.
projects.visToggleHint: Tap to toggle Basic / Advanced-only visibility
projects.noneBasic: No projects are available in Basic mode yet. Switch to Advanced mode to manage visibility.
mode.label: View mode
apptab.prepareHint: Write preview instructions into this project's CLAUDE.md
apptab.prepared: Wrote preview steps to CLAUDE.md -- review it in the Files tab, then ask Claude to start the app.
apptab.emptyBody: Ask Claude in the Chat tab to start your app on port {port}, bound to 0.0.0.0 and launched detached so it keeps running.
pwgate.title: Welcome back
pwgate.subtitle: Enter your access code to open your workspace.
pwgate.wrong: Wrong access code. Please try again.
pwgate.throttled: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
chat.greeting: Hi! How can I help you today?
chat.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.sendError: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.
chat.uploadError: Couldn't upload the file. Please try again.
chat.resumed: We're picking up where you left off. What would you like to do next?
chat.resumeError: Couldn't load that conversation. You can still continue it by sending a message.
chat.noSelfRepo: The Claude Web repo is not registered on this host.
chat.busyError: Another chat is already running in this project. Wait for it to finish, then try again.
understanding.title: Understanding
understanding.prefill: Ask Claude to write its understanding first
understanding.prefillPrompt: Before acting on my requests, first write your understanding of what I'm asking to `understanding.md` at the repo root, as markdown: a short restatement of the goal, the concrete things you'll do, and any assumptions. Keep it current if the request changes, and let me confirm it before you proceed.
feature.kickoffPrompt: I want you to start a new feature. make sure you are on the main branch that is synced with origin/main. create a new feature branch. Make a new entry in the Active feature plans section in plans.md . This is the feature we will be working on:
prompts.title: Custom prompts
prompts.empty: No custom prompts yet. Add one below.
prompts.textPlaceholder: Prompt text — inserted into the chat box
localapp.formBody: Which port does {name} serve on? The Local tab serves it through the harness, so it's reachable wherever you can log in — but never on the public home page.
localapp.saveError: Couldn't save the port. Please try again.
localapp.howTitle: Need to show a web app here?
localapp.howIntro: Most apps need a small one-time tweak to appear in this tab (serve the UI and API on one loopback port, with relative URLs). An agent can do it for you:
localapp.howStep1: Open an agent in the Claude Web repository (this app's own project).
localapp.howStep2: Give it the full path to the web app you want to expose.
localapp.howStep3: Ask it to reconfigure the app so it can be exposed through the Local tab — then enter the port it gives you above.
localapp.howNote: That's exactly how the apps already shown here were set up.
expose.someFail: {ok}/{total} checks pass — see what to fix below.
expose.error: Couldn't run the exposure check. Please try again.
expose.freshOk: Embed is current (not a cached copy).
expose.freshStale: Your browser is showing a stale copy of the embed.
expose.freshStaleDetail: Loaded {live}, but the current build is {server}. This is a browser-cache issue, not a product problem.
expose.freshBlankDetail: The embed rendered blank while the server is serving the current build ({server}). This is a browser-cache issue, not a product problem.
localapp.noProject: Select a project first — the Local tab shows the current project's app.
ideas.empty: No ideas yet for this project. Write one above.
ideas.loadError: Couldn't load this project's ideas. Please try again.
ideas.saveError: Couldn't save the idea. Please try again.
ideas.deleteError: Couldn't delete the idea. Please try again.
deploy.loadError: Couldn't load deploy status. Please try again.
deploy.keepError: Couldn't disarm the rollback. Please try again.
deploy.rollbackError: Couldn't start the rollback. Please try again.
deploy.noLedger: No deploys recorded yet. The next deploy will appear here.
deploy.notArmed: No rollback armed. The last deploy is settled.
picker.empty: No conversations yet. Start a new one!

files.longPressHint: Tip: press and hold a file to add it to your message
files.pin: Pin to the top of Files
history.restoredToast: Done -- went back to that version
history.restoreErrorToast: Couldn't go back -- please try again
history.loadError: We couldn't load your saved versions. Please try again.
history.emptyHint: Tap Save at the top to keep a snapshot of your work.
history.confirmBody: This will undo all changes made after:
